'''lothabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:foeless|foeless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foeless|foeless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lothabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lothabithi|lothabithi]] || [[word:lothabiji|lothabiji]] || [[word:lothabishi|lothabishi]] || [[word:lothabiki|lothabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lothabuthuthu|lothabuthuthu]] || [[word:lothabujuju|lothabujuju]] || [[word:lothabushushu|lothabushushu]] || [[word:lothabukuku|lothabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lothabuthu|lothabuthu]] || [[word:lothabuju|lothabuju]] || [[word:lothabushu|lothabushu]] || [[word:lothabuku|lothabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lothabufthuf|lothabufthuf]] || [[word:lothabufjuf|lothabufjuf]] || [[word:lothabufshuf|lothabufshuf]] || [[word:lothabufkuf|lothabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lothabethe|lothabethe]] || [[word:lothabeje|lothabeje]] || [[word:lothabeshe|lothabeshe]] || [[word:lothabeke|lothabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lothabothotho|lothabothotho]] || [[word:lothabojojo|lothabojojo]] || [[word:lothaboshosho|lothaboshosho]] || [[word:lothabokoko|lothabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lothabotho|lothabotho]] || [[word:lothabojo|lothabojo]] || [[word:lothabosho|lothabosho]] || [[word:lothaboko|lothaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lothabofthof|lothabofthof]] || [[word:lothabofjof|lothabofjof]] || [[word:lothabofshof|lothabofshof]] || [[word:lothabofkof|lothabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lothabïfthïf|lothabïfthïf]] || [[word:lothabïfjïf|lothabïfjïf]] || [[word:lothabïfshïf|lothabïfshïf]] || [[word:lothabïfkïf|lothabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lothabïfthïfthïf|lothabïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:lothabïfjïfjïf|lothabïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:lothabïfshïfshïf|lothabïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:lothabïfkïfkïf|lothabïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lothabïfthïf|lothabïfthïf]] || [[word:lothabïfjïf|lothabïfjïf]] || [[word:lothabïfshïf|lothabïfshïf]] || [[word:lothabïfkïf|lothabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lothabïfthïf|lothabïfthïf]] || [[word:lothabïfjïf|lothabïfjïf]] || [[word:lothabïfshïf|lothabïfshïf]] || [[word:lothabïfkïf|lothabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lothabæthæ|lothabæthæ]] || [[word:lothabæjæ|lothabæjæ]] || [[word:lothabæshæ|lothabæshæ]] || [[word:lothabækæ|lothabækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lothabathatha|lothabathatha]] || [[word:lothabajaja|lothabajaja]] || [[word:lothabashasha|lothabashasha]] || [[word:lothabakaka|lothabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lothabatha|lothabatha]] || [[word:lothabaja|lothabaja]] || [[word:lothabasha|lothabasha]] || [[word:lothabaka|lothabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lothabafthaf|lothabafthaf]] || [[word:lothabafjaf|lothabafjaf]] || [[word:lothabafshaf|lothabafshaf]] || [[word:lothabafkaf|lothabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lothabasha|lothabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lothabshësha|lothabshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lothabrosha|lothabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lothabmusha|lothabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lothabyasha|lothabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golothabnkshësha|golothabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golothabnkrosha|golothabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golothabnkmusha|golothabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golothabnkyasha|golothabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lothathabasha|lothathabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lothathabshësha|lothathabshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lothathabrosha|lothathabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lothathabmusha|lothathabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lothathabyasha|lothathabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golothathabnkshësha|golothathabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golothathabnkrosha|golothathabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golothathabnkmusha|golothathabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golothathabnkyasha|golothathabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lethæbasha|lethæbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lethæbshësha|lethæbshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lethæbrosha|lethæbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lethæbmusha|lethæbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lethæbyasha|lethæbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golethæbnkshësha|golethæbnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golethæbnkrosha|golethæbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golethæbnkmusha|golethæbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golethæbnkyasha|golethæbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lothfabasha|lothfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lothfabshësha|lothfabshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lothfabrosha|lothfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lothfabmusha|lothfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lothfabyasha|lothfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golothfabnkshësha|golothfabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golothfabnkrosha|golothfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golothfabnkmusha|golothfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golothfabnkyasha|golothfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
